Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB coding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurrenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: current gas volume in pressure pipe
a030A status erase DTC from mirror memory
Number of included AUTOSAR SW modules

Item.Text: Not assigned, to be used by not (yet) listed vendors

Data.Name: DCX Unified Diagnostic Services - Diagnostic Protocol Version DC-10747
DCX ECU Flash Reprogramming Requirements Definition Version DC-10761
DCX Diagnostic Performance Requirements Standard DC-10746
Business Unit Specific Partnumber for Chrysler Group
set-up of refill chargelevel of SCRMon

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests /Clip import: Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enables P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl,)

Request.Name: DataRead.status trigger for release of rinsing function
DataRead.current gas volume in pressure pipe read

DataItem.Name: current gas volume in pressure pipe

Request.Name: DataRead.a0302 status pressure conditioning test 0 read
DataRead.a030A status erase DTC from mirror memory read

DataItem.Name: a030A status erase DTC from mirror memory

Request.Name: DataRead.correction offset for longitudinal acceleration sensor LAS_a read
DataRead.correction offset for transversal acceleration sensor read
DataRead.End of Line Task Inducementsystem read

DataItem.Name: Number of included AUTOSAR SW modules
DCX Unified Diagnostic Services - Diagnostic Protocol Version DC-10747
DCX ECU Flash Reprogramming Requirements Definition Version DC-10761
DCX Diagnostic Performance Requirements Standard DC-10746

Request.Name: DataRead.Mercedes Car Group Hardware Part Number Read
DataRead.Business Unit Specific Partnumber for Chrysler Group

DataItem.Name: Business Unit Specific Partnumber for Chrysler Group
set-up of refill chargelevel of SCRMon

Request.Name: DataWrite.correction offset for longitudinal acceleration sensor LAS_a write
DataWrite.correction offset for transversal acceleration sensor write
DataWrite.trigger offset teach-in acceleration sensors write
DataWrite.End of Line Task Inducementsystem write
DataWrite.Exhaust Regulation Or Type Approval Number Write

Test.Description: Unused: _
DevLibBattULo: The vehicle voltage is too low. _
BattUSRCMin: The on-board voltage is too low.. The electrical voltage is below the limit value.
DevLibBattUHi: The vehicle voltage is too high. _
BattUSRCMax: The vehicle voltage is too high. The limit value of voltage is exceeded.
MoCROMErrXPg: There is an internal ECU-error in ROM-Memory. _ Reductant Control Module Performance
SSwtSVarMngDatasetIdErr: The ECU coding is wrong. There is an error in the data memory.
SSwtSVarMngDatasetSwtErr: The ECU coding is wrong. There is an error in the program memory.
SSwtSVarMngEEPErr: The ECU coding is wrong. There is an error in the control memory.
EEPRdErr: There is an internal error in EEPROM of the ECU. There is an error in the data memory.
EEPRdErr: There is an internal error in EEPROM of the ECU. There is an error in the calibration and parametrization memory.
UDosVlvOvrTemp: The temperature in the ECU is too high. The component or the system has overtemperature.
SSpMon1: The output 1 for the reference voltage of the sensors has malfunction. _
SSpMon3: The output 3 for reference voltage of sensors has a malfunction. _
TECUSRCMin_0: The internal temperature sensor from the ECU ''AdBlue®'' has short circuit to ground. _
TECUSRCMin_0: The internal temperature sensor from the ECU ''AdBlue®'' has short circuit to ground. There is a short circuit to ground.
TECUSRCMax_0: The internal temperature sensor from the ECU ''AdBlue®'' has short circuit to positive
TECUSRCMax_1: The internal temperature sensor from the ECU ''AdBlue®'' has short circuit to Plus. There is a short circuit to positive.
SCRCtlIndSysActv: The AdBlue® system has malfunction. _
ComCPCFctInhb0: The control unit ''AdBlue®'' has a malfunction.
ComCPCFctInhb1: The control unit ''AdBlue®'' has a malfunction. There is a general electrical fault.
ComCPCFctInhb2: The control unit ''AdBlue®'' has a malfunction. There is a general signal fault.
ComCPCFctInhb3: The control unit ''AdBlue®'' has a malfunction. There is a FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) fault.
ComCPCFctInhb4: The control unit ''AdBlue®'' has a malfunction. There is a system internal fault.
ComCPCFctInhb5: The control unit ''AdBlue®'' has a malfunction. There is a system programming fault.
ComCPCFctInhb6: The control unit ''AdBlue®'' has a malfunction. There is a algorithm based fault.
ComCPCFctInhb7: The control unit ''AdBlue®'' has a malfunction. There is a mechanical fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr0: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr1: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a general electrical fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr2: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a general signal fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr3: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr4: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a system internal fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr5: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a system programming fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr6: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a algorithm based fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr7: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a mechanical fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr8: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a Bus Signal / Message fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr9: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a component fault.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr10: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr11: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr12: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr13: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr14: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr15: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr16: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. Reserved for ISO/SAE
ComCPCFctInhbMgr17: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a short circuit to ground.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr18: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a short circuit to positive.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr19: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is an open circuit.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr20: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a short circuit to ground or an open circuit.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr21: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. There is a short circuit to positive or an open circuit.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr22: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The electrical voltage is below the limit value.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr23: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The limit value of voltage is exceeded.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr24: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The limit value for current has not been attained.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr25: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The limit value for current has been exceeded.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr26: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The limit value for resistance has not been attained.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr27: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The limit value for resistance has been exceeded.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr28: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The value of voltage is out of range.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr29: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The value of current is out of range.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr30: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. The value of resistance is out of range.
ComCPCFctInhbMgr31: The internal communication of the control unit has a malfunction. Ther is a intermittent fault.
UHtrTnkOL: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has an electrical error or open circuit. There is an open circuit.
UHtrTnkSCG: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has a short circuit to ground. There is a short circuit to ground.
UHtrTnkSRCMinDiag: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has a short circuit to ground. The limit value for electrical voltage has not been attained.
UHtrTnkPhyRngLoDiag: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has a short circuit to ground. The signal amplitude is less than the minimum amplitude.
UHtrTnkSCB: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has a short circuit to positive. There is a short circuit to positive.
UHtrTnkSRCMaxDiag: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has a short circuit to positive. The limit value for electrical voltage has not been attained.
UHtrTnkPhyRngHiDiag: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has a short circuit to positive. The signal amplitude is greater than the maximum amplitude.
SCRMonMetCtlUndrPresErrLo: A leakeage was detected in the AdBlue® system. The signal change rate is below the permissible limit value.
SCRPODUrDosVlvTCoilPlaus: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) has malfunction. There is an invalid signal.
UDosVlvOvht: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) has malfunction. There is malfunction due to overtemperature.
SCRPODPlausUDosVlvFinal: The AdBlue® proportionin valve (cylinder bank 1) has malfunction. The actuator is blocked.
SCRPODAdvDosVlvTMon: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) has malfunction. The component or the system has over temperature. SCRPODAdvDosVlvTMon
SCRRlySnsrSplyOL: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has an electrical error. There is an open circuit.
UTnkCLSSensMon: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has malfunction. _
UTnkCLSLvlPhyRngLo: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has malfunction. The signal amplitude is less than the minimum amplitude.
UTnkCLSLvlPhyRngHi: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has malfunction. The signal amplitude is greater than the maximum amplitude.
SCRPODPlausUTnkLvlHi: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has malfunction. The signal change rate is above the permissible limit value.
UTnkCLSNoEcho: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has malfunction. There is an internal electrical fault. UTnkCLSNoEcho
UTnkCLSLoLine: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has malfunction. There is a signal below the permissible limit value. UTnkCLSLoLine
UTnkCLSHiLine: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has malfunction. There is a signal above the permissible limit value. UTnkCLSHiLine
UTnkLvlPlausErr: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has malfunction. There is an incorrect signal.
SCRRlySnsrSplySCG: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has a short circuit to ground. There is a short circuit to ground.
UTnkCLSLvlSRCMin: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has a short circuit to ground. There is no signal change: voltage level is too low.
SCRRlySnsrSplySCB: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has a short circuit to positive. There is a short circuit to positive.
UTnkCLSLvlSRCMax: The AdBlue® fill level sensor has a short circuit to positive. There is no signal change: voltage level is too high.
UDosVlvOL: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) has an electrical error or an open circuit. There is an open circuit.
UDosVlvSCG: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) has a short circuit to ground. There is a short circuit to ground.
UDosVlvSCGHS: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) has a short circuit to ground. There is a short circuit to ground or an open circuit.
UDosVlvSCB: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) has a short circuit to positive. There is a short circuit to positive.
UDosVlvSCBHS: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) has a short circuit to positive. There is a short circuit to positive or an open circuit.
SCRPODPSnsrPlausLo: The AdBlue® pressure sensor has a short circuit to ground. _
SCRPODPSnsrPlausHi: The AdBlue® pressure sensor has a short circuit to positive. _
UTnkCLSTPhyRngLo: The temperature sensor ''AdBlue® Behälter'' has malfunction. The signal amplitude is less than the minimum amplitude.
UTnkCLSTPhyRngHi: The temperature sensor ''AdBlue® Behälter'' has malfunction. The signal amplitude is greater than the maximum amplitude.
UTnkCLSTVDOffsetChk: The temperature sensor ''AdBlue® Behälter'' has malfunction. The signal offset is outside the persmissible range.
UTnkCLSTVDPlausChkWrm: The temperature sensor ''AdBlue® Behälter'' has malfunction. The signal comparison is faulty.
UTnkCLSTVDPlausTMin: The temperature sensor ''AdBlue® Behälter'' has malfunction. There is a signal below de permissible value.
UTnkCLSTVDPlausTMax: The temperature sensor ''AdBlue® Behälter'' has malfunction. There is a signal above de permissible value.
UTnkCLSTSRCMin: The temperature sensor ''AdBlue® Behälter'' has a short circuit to ground. There is no signal change: voltage level is too low.
UTnkCLSTSRCMax: The temperature sensor ''AdBlue® Behälter'' has a short circuit to positive. There is no signal change: voltage level is too high.
SCRRlySplyPmpOL: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has an electrical fault or an open circuit. _
UrSolnPmpOL: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has an electrical fault or an open circuit. There is an open circuit.
SCRPODPlausSplyPmp: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has malfunction. _
SCRPODUrSolnPmp: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has malfunction. The signal change rate is below the permissible limit value.
SCRMonSplyPmpIntkChDfrst: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has malfunction. There is an invalid signal. SCRMonSplyPmpIntkChDfrst
SCRMonSplyPmpPLineDfrst: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has malfunction. The system function is restricted. SCRMonSplyPmpPLineDfrst
SCRPODSplyPmpCoil: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has malfunction. The component or the system has over temperature.
UrSolnPmpSCG: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has a short circuit to ground. Short circuit to ground.
SCRRlySplyPmpSCG: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has a short circuit to ground. Short circuit to ground or an open circuit.
UrSolnPmpSCB: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has a short circuit to positive. Short circuit to positive.
SCRRlySplyPmpSCB: The output of AdBlue® transfer pump has a short circuit to positive. Short circuit to Plus or an open circuit.
SCRPODPlausUDosVlv: The AdBlue® proportioning valve (cylinder bank 1) is jammed closed. The actuator does not open.
UHCHydRls: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has malfunction. _
UHCTnkOLDurCtl: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has malfunction. The limit value for current has not been attained.
UHCTnkPTCShCirErr: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has malfunction. The limit value for resistance has not been attained.
UHCTnkPTCOpCirErr: The heating unit from AdBlue® tank module has malfunction. The limit value for resistance has been exceeded.
UHtrPLOL: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has an electrical fault or an open circuit. There is an open circuit.
UHCPLOLDurCtl: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has malfunction. The limit value for current has not been attained.
UHCPLPTCShCirErr: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has malfunction. The limit value for resistance has not been attained.
UHCPLPTCOpCirErr: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has malfunction. The limit value for resistance has been exceeded.
UHtrPLSCG: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has a short circuit to ground. There is a short circuit to ground.
UHtrPLSRCMinDiag: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has a short circuit to ground. The limit value for current has not been attained.
UHtrPLPhyRngLoDiag: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has a short circuit to ground. The signal amplitude is less than the minimum amplitude.
UHtrPLSCB: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has a short circuit to positive. There is a short circuit to positive.
UHtrPLSRCMaxDiag: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has a short circuit to positive. The limit value for resistance has been exceeded.
UHtrPLPhyRngHiDiag: The output for the heating element from AdBlue® pressure line has a short circuit to positive. The signal amplitude is greater than the maximum amplitude.
SCRMonPresBuildUpPurg: The pressure in the AdBlue® system is too low. _ SCRMonPresBuildUpPurg
SCRMonPresBuildUpErr: The pressure in the AdBlue® system is too low. There is no signal change: voltage level is too low.
SCRMonMetCtlUndrPresErrHi: The pressure in the AdBlue® system is too low. The signal change rate is below the permissible limit value.
SCRMonOvrPresErrHi: The pressure in the AdBlue® system is too high. _
SCRMonOvrPresErrLo: The pressure in the AdBlue® system is too high. The signal change rate is above the permissible limit value.
SCRPODPRednErr: The pressure in the AdBlue® system is too high. The system function is restricted. Reductant Pump "B" Control Range/Performance (SCRPODPRednErr)
ComCollMilErr: The output for the relay ''AdBlue® Supply'' has malfunction (shutdown too early). _
MRlyErlyOpng: The output for the relay ''AdBlue® Supply'' has malfunction (shutdown too early). The function or the instruction is faulty.
MRlyErlyOpngRngAftRun: The output for the relay ''AdBlue® Supply'' has malfunction (shutdown too early). There is an unexpected instruction.
MRlyStk: The output for the relay ''AdBlue® Supply'' has malfunction (shutdown too late). The actuator is blocked.
SCRPODCnsDeMonMin: The AdBlue® consumption is too low. _SCRPODCnsDeMonMin
SCRPODCnsDeMonMax: The AdBlue® consumption is too high. _SCRPODCnsDeMonMax
SCRPODPlausUDosVlvOpenBlkd: Error proportioning valve plausibility - valve blocked open
SCRRlyBackFlowPmpOL: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has an electrical fault or an open circuit. _
UrBackFlowPmpOL: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has an electrical fault or an open circuit. There is an open circuit.
SCRMonBackFlowCh: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has malfunction. _ Reductant Pump "B" Control Range/Performance (SCRMonBackFlowCh)

SCRPODUrSolPmpBkFlw: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has malfunction. The signal change rate is below the permissible limit value. Reductant Pump "B" Control Range/Performance (SCRPODUrSolPmpBkFlw)
SCRPODVolLrnUndrMinBFP: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has malfunction. There is a signal below de permissible value. Reductant Pump "B" Control Range/Performance (SCRPODVolLrnUndrMinBFP)
SCRPODVolLrnOverMaxBFP: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has malfunction. There is a signal above the permissible value. Reductant Pump "B" Control Range/Performance ()SCRPODVolLrnOverMaxBFP)
UrBackFlowPmpSCG: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has a short circuit to ground. There is a short circuit to ground.
SCRRlyBackFlowPmpSCG: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has a short circuit to ground. There is a short circuit to ground or an open circuit.
UrBackFlowPmpSCB: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has a short circuit to positive. There is a short circuit to positive.
SCRRlyBackFlowPmpSCB: The output for the AdBlue® scavenge pump has a short circuit to positive. There is a short circuit to positive or an open circuit.
SCRRlyBackFlowPmpOT: _ Reductant Control Module Performance
MoCComErrCnt: There is an internal error. Reductant Control Module Performance
UrBackFlowPmpOT: There is a component fault. Reductant Control Module Performance
UHCTnkExtShCirErr: The limit value for current has been exceeded. Heating from urea tank, external short circuit
SCRRlySplyPmpOT: There is no signal change: voltage level is too high. Reductant Control Module Performance
SCRRlySnsrSplyOT: There is a malfunction due to overtemperature. Reductant Control Module Performance
UHtrTnkOvrTemp: The signal calculation is faulty. Reductant Control Module Performance
MoCComSPI: Incorrect data were received. Reductant Control Module Performance : disturbed SPI-communication
UrSolnPmpOvrTemp: There is an unexpected instruction. Reductant Control Module Performance
UHtrPLOvrTemp: The component or the system has over temperature. Reductant Control Module Performance
SCRPODUrTankLvlDynPlaus: _ The signal of the level indicator from urea tank is implausible
SCRPODTiTilClsdLoop: The maximum permissible time for enabling of AdBlue® injection has been exceeded.
UDCRdcAgRmn: The emission limit for the NOx concentration has been exceeded (AdBlue® tank is empty). _
BusDiagCANABusOff: The communication with powertrain-CAN-Bus has a malfunction. Bus OFF
BusDiagCANBBusOff: The communication with the chassis CAN bus has malfunction. Bus OFF
BusDiagCANCBusOff: The communication with powertrain sensor-CAN-Bus has a malfunction. Bus OFF
BusDiagCANDBusOff: The communication with the hybrid CAN bus has malfunction. Bus OFF
ComEngECUEXH3TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. _
ComEngECUEXH1TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. There is a general signal fault. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUEXH2TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. The signal is not present In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side

ComEngECUEng3TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. The duration of the actuation was exceeded: overload protection is active. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD1BRTO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. The message is missing. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUEng4TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUEng2TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD5BRTO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUPTSNSRR1TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUPTSNSRR2TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUSCR4TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUVEHDYNSTTO: The communication with ECU 'combustion engine' has a malfunction. ComEngECUVEHDYNSTTO
ComEngECUOBD6BRTO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUASM1TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUASM2TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUEng7TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction.
ComEngECUOBD2BRTO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD3BRTO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD4BRTO: The communication with ECU 'combustion engine' has a malfunction. A time-out error occured on receiver-side in CAN-communication
ComEngECUSCR2TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUSCR3TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUSCR1TO: The communication with the ECU "combustion engine" has malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several timeout error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD4BRTO: Communication with control unit ''Drivetrain'' has a malfunction. The message is missing. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUTHERM3TO: The Communication with control unit ''Drivetrain'' has a malfunction. ComEngECUTHERM3TO
ComEngECUTHERM1TO: The Communication with control unit ''Drivetrain'' has a malfunction. ComEngECUTHERM1TO
ComEngECUTHERM2TO: The Communication with control unit ''Drivetrain'' has a malfunction. ComEngECUTHERM2TO
ComEngECUVEHDYNSTTO: The Communication with control unit ''Traction system'' has a malfunction. The message is missing. ComEngECUVEHDYNSTTO
ComEngECUECM2TO: The Communication with control unit ''Traction system'' has a malfunction. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUEng1TO: The Communication with the electronic ignition lock has a malfunction.The message is missing. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUEXH3DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. _
UCatUsTSig: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. There is a signal fault or the message is faulty.
EnvTDef: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. There is a component fault.
ComEngECUEXH2DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. The signal is not present In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side

ComEngECUEng3DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. The duration of the actuation was exceeded: overload protection is active. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
EnvTAmbTempMon: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. There is an implausible signal.
ComEngECUEXH1DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. Incorrect data were received. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
EnvPSig: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. There is an incorrect signal.
ComEngECUOBD1BRDLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. The message is missing. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUEng4DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUEng2DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD5BRDLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUPTSNSRR1DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUPTSNSRR2DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUSCR4DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD6BRDLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side

ComEngECUEng7DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''.
ComEngECUOBD2BRDLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD3BRDLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUOBD4BRDLC: Implausible data was received by ECU "combustion engine". A CAN-DLC error occured in CAN-communication on receiver side
ComEngECUSCR2DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''combustion engine''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side

ComVehAccPlaus: Implausible data were received from ECU ''tractive system''. _
ComVehTransAccPlaus: Implausible data were received from ECU ''tractive system''. There is a signal fault or the message is faulty.
ComVehLongAccPlaus: Implausible data were received from ECU ''tractive system''. There is an invalid signal.
ComEngECUECM2DLC: Implausible data were received from ECU ''tractive system''. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side

ComEngECUEng1DLC: Implausible data were received from the electronic ignition lock. There is a signal fault or the message is faulty. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side

ComEngECUOBD4BRDLC: Unplausible Daten wurden vom Steuergerät 'Antriebsstrang' empfangen. There is a signal fault or the message is faulty. In the CAN communication occured several CAN-DLC-error at the receiving side
ComEngECUTHERM3DLC: Implausible data were received from control unit ''Drivetrain''. ComEngECUTHERM3DLC
